{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192011CA7BE78AAD0C6898F893"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610847108610048792","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总体是那种酸甜酸甜的口感，比赛的过程描绘的很细节，感情也很细腻，剧情还算流畅。有一点简介上没有写，就是林之前有过一个暗恋的人，所以不算双初恋。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772040634,"group_id":"7587683015896075289","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"宝宝我好喜欢给你们写书评(〃∇〃)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2sUHcMl8HK1SL+BVFlJl6vA2tK4Z+d+IANQcSHF9D0x","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e025311e45664bf9b0117795223c547f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792445&x-signature=FqjrZZEmrcaYlaov1gu0rDt47cw%3D","user_id":"3558455926075693","user_name":"远山连暮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3558455926075693","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7587683015896075289","book_info":{"abstract":"【双男主+年下+电竞+双强】
【落魄天才AD受x最佳新人打野攻】
【前期游戏描写比较多，后期主剧情】
17岁天才AD选手kyle拿了人生中第一个世界冠军之后，其余四位初代队友四处分散各自为王。
此后战队成绩一落千丈，俱乐部解散，曾经的天才选手沦落到无人问津的尴尬境地。
合同被卖，他不得不加入一个二线俱乐部。
从此与冠军无缘。
半年后，一个新人打野组建的俱乐部向他抛来橄榄枝。
“敢不敢赌一把？”
冷心冷面的天之骄子只为他低头。
决赛场的聚光灯下，大家仿佛回到了7年前的那个夏天。
万水千山只为来圆一个七年的梦。
“也没人和我说kyle的榜一就是今年的最佳新人啊？！”
-
“这场金色的雨是我的聘礼。”
“你喜欢吗？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o4ce724ce79d75b8f04ca44a6c53ef846~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"不爱吃糯米滋","author_id":"","book_id":"7587683015896075289","book_name":"暗恋成真？世界冠军我也要了！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b0b0c0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":508,"name":"电竞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=508&name=电竞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":509,"name":"游戏主播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=509&name=游戏主播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7587683413948121625","read_count":"220","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"249750"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"121","tags":"双男主,纯爱,电竞,天才,现代,直播,游戏主播","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/900d6d617df98fe1ed4ba54829538b59~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779448811&x-signature=CEdP2su4GmlAtabydGebYbYd6P4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4097201026645364","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"81"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323192011CA7BE78AAD0C6898F893"}"},"relate_info_list":[],
